SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE — NOT AN OFFICIAL GOVERNMENT REPORT
Alberta Crop Report
Crop conditions as of July 14, 2026
Table 1: Regional Crop Condition Ratings as of July 14, 2026
Per Cent Rated Good-to-Excellent Conditions
South Central N East N West Peace Alberta
Spring Wheat * 84.8% 85.5% 57.6% 42.1% 59.6% 69.0%
Durum 78.1% 100.0% - - - 81.6%
Barley * 83.8% 82.1% 46.6% 34.8% 58.4% 69.1%
Canola * 87.0% 72.8% 47.9% 21.5% 50.1% 56.0%
Dry Peas * 84.3% 86.2% 52.8% 20.6% 53.2% 72.2%
Source: AGI/AFSC Crop Reporting Survey
